summary: A utilitarian, classic-academic website for the fictional Calderwood Coastal Laboratory, a university marine-research group on Penobscot Bay studying coastal ecosystems, fisheries, and climate impact.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Lab overview, mission, key stats, research areas, and featured project.

pages.title: About
pages.purpose: Mission, values, fifty-year history timeline, and facilities.

pages.title: Research
pages.purpose: Four research programs, active projects, and the Penobscot Sentinel monitoring network.

pages.title: People
pages.purpose: Faculty, postdocs, graduate students, and field/technical staff directory.

pages.title: Publications
pages.purpose: Selected peer-reviewed papers, datasets, reports, and open-data resources.

pages.title: Join & Collaborate
pages.purpose: Admissions, collaboration, community partnerships, press, and visiting information.
